name: plumbline
description: Prompts-as-code CI: compile prompts from one source kernel, verify parity by hash, and gate behavior plus a small adversarial tier before merge. Ships a business-diagnostic engine (built on the Alex Hormozi corpus) as the reference payload.

scripts.eval:l1: cd evals && npx promptfoo eval -c promptfooconfig.l1.yaml --output ../eval-results.l1.json
scripts.eval:l2: cd evals && npx promptfoo eval -c promptfooconfig.l2.yaml --output ../eval-results.l2.json
scripts.eval:security: cd evals && npx promptfoo eval -c promptfooconfig.security.yaml --output ../eval-results.security.json
scripts.eval: npm run eval:l1 && npm run eval:l2
